ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the device is installed in */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the device was installed */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the GPS device */,
  "device_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the GPS device */,
  "device_firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the GPS device */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the device was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., car, truck, bus) */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., diesel, petrol) */,
  "fuel_capacity" REAL /* Fuel capacity of the vehicle in liters */,
  "odometer_reading" INTEGER /* Current odometer reading of the vehicle */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service */,
  "next_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that sent the location data */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the location data */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the location */,
  "speed_kmph" REAL /* Speed of the vehicle at the location in km/h */,
  "heading" REAL /* Heading of the vehicle (direction in degrees from true north) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the GPS location in meters */,
  "satellites_used" INTEGER /* Number of GPS satellites used to determine the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location (for easier human-readable location data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distances" (
  "distance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distance record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location record associated with the distance data */,
  "distance_km" REAL /* Distance traveled by the vehicle in km */,
  "start_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting location */,
  "end_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ending location */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in minutes */,
  "fuel_consumed_liters" REAL /* Fuel consumed during the trip in liters */,
  "average_speed_kmph" REAL /* Average speed during the trip in km/h */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distances_end_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distances_start_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distances_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, driver) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., speeding, idling, geofence) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was resolved */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the alert (e.g., 1 for high, 2 for medium, 3 for low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
